creator: timur@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Daniel Engberg from comment #2)

Hi, Daniel!

Is there any use for this patch anymore? samba411 should be deprecated ages ago, and now deprecated samba413 depends on ldb22.

And in general, by default samba omes with it's own LDB.

So, I can update it, but shouldn't ldb20 be just removed instead?

With regards,
Timur
